title: buildah: honor rootless config file
body:
and support for fuse-overlayfs by creating a new mount namespace when unsharing

Continuation of: https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1123

comments.body: LGTM assuming happy tests.  I see now @giuseppe , we want to close #1123 and go forward with this one.  I'm thinking the tests issues are not related to this patch.

@TomSweeneyRedHat I'd like a ACK from @rhatdan first and what he thinks.

With this PR it will be possible to use fuse-overlayfs similarly to how it is done with podman

:pushpin: Commit acd746b has been approved by `rhatdan`
